stem: Under Section 34(1) of the FAA, to whom must a licensed financial adviser disclose all material information about a recommended designated investment product?

options.D: Only clients who ask in writing

explanation: Section 34(1) 要求向"每位客户及潜在客户"披露推荐指定投资产品的所有重大资料,不限于已付费或主动查询的客户。

stem: A licensed FA, with intent to deceive, makes a misleading statement about the amount payable under a proposed investment contract, but no contract is ever concluded. Under Section 35 of the FAA:

options.A: No offence is committed because the contract did not come into being
options.B: It is still an offence; fine up to S$50,000 or imprisonment up to 12 months or both
options.D: The fine is capped at S$25,000

explanation: Section 35 明确规定即使合约未成立仍属犯罪,罚款最高 S$50,000 或监禁最高 12 个月或两者兼施;故 A 错;此处罚则为 S$50,000 而非 S$25,000,D 错。

stem: Under Section 36 of the FAA, a licensed FA is said to have a 'reasonable basis' for a recommendation when it:

options.A: Recommends the product with the highest commission
options.B: Obtains the client's signature on a disclaimer
options.C: Gives reasonable consideration and investigation to the client's objectives, financial situation and needs, and bases the recommendation on that
options.D: Confirms the client has read the prospectus

explanation: Section 36(2) 规定合理基础是指就客户的投资目标、财务状况及特定需要作合理考量与调查,且推荐基于该考量;其余选项与适合性义务无关。

stem: Under Section 37 of the FAA, a lien or claim on client's money or property in an account is void UNLESS:

options.A: The client has given oral consent
options.C: MAS has been notified within seven days
options.D: The moneys in the account are for fees due and owing to the licensed financial adviser

explanation: Section 37(2) 规定账户上的留置权/索赔权一律无效,唯一例外是账户款项为应付予 FA 的费用;其余选项均非法定例外。

stem: Under Section 41(1) of the FAA, a financial adviser that receives insurance moneys must establish and maintain a separate account with:

options.A: Any overseas bank chosen by the client
options.B: A bank licensed under the Banking Act 1970
options.D: A cash safe on its own premises

explanation: Section 41(1) 要求在《Banking Act 1970》下持牌的银行开立并维持独立的人寿保险经纪保费账户。

stem: Under Regulation 20(3) of the FAR, which of the following is NOT a permitted reason to withdraw moneys from a life insurance broking premium account?

options.A: Payment to a person entitled to receive the moneys
options.B: Payment to an insurer for amounts due under a contract of insurance
options.C: A personal loan to a director of the financial adviser
options.D: Repayment of moneys paid into the account in error

explanation: Reg 20(3) 仅允许付予有权收款者、付予保险人、存入持牌银行投资、退还误存款项四类提款;向董事发放个人贷款不在其中。

stem: Under Section 42 of the FAA, the prohibition on negotiating a contract of insurance with an unlicensed insurer does NOT apply to:

options.A: Reinsurance and risks situated outside Singapore
options.B: Any life policy sold to a Singapore resident

explanation: Section 42 的禁止不适用于再保险、新加坡以外的风险及其他订明风险;其余选项并非法定豁免,且条文正是针对境外网售保险。

stem: Under Regulation 20A of the FAR, a licensed FA (or its representative) must enter particulars of an acquired interest in Listed Specified Products into the register, and retain that entry, within / for which periods?

options.C: Within 7 days of trade settlement only; no minimum retention
options.D: Within 7 days of acquiring the interest; retain not less than 5 years

explanation: Reg 20A(1) 要求取得权益后 7 日内登记,并以易于查阅的形式保留该记录不少于 5 年,且须在新加坡存放副本。

stem: Under Regulation 18 of the FAR, the aggregate amount of unsecured advances, loans and credit facilities a licensed FA may grant to its directors, officers, employees or representatives must not, outstanding at any one time, exceed:
explanation: Reg 18(1) 设定无抵押垫款/贷款/信贷便利任何一刻未偿还合计上限为 S$3,000;其余数字分别对应不同罚则金额,与此处无关。

stem: Under Section 63(1) of the FAA, prior approval of the MAS (via Form 11) is required when a licensed FA wishes to:

options.A: Appoint its chief executive officer or a director, or change a director from non-executive to executive

explanation: Section 63(1) 要求委任 CEO 或董事、或将董事由非执行改为执行须经 MAS 事先批准(提交 Form 11);其余事项不在该条文范围。

stem: A prohibition order has been made against a person and notified to a licensed FA. Under Section 69(2) of the FAA, if the FA nonetheless employs that person to provide prohibited financial advisory services, the FA is liable on conviction to a fine not exceeding:
explanation: Section 69(2) 规定受通知的 FA 在禁止范围内聘用或使用该人即属犯罪,罚款最高 S$50,000。

stem: Under Section 113 of the FAA, an officer or employee of a licensed FA who wilfully makes a false entry in the FA's records shall be liable on conviction to a fine not exceeding S$100,000 or imprisonment for a term not exceeding:
explanation: Section 113(1) 对故意伪造/遗漏/更改记录订明罚款最高 S$100,000 或监禁最高 2 年或两者兼施;同一上限亦见于 s.112。
